nasb.text: Both the Pharisees and the scribes began to grumble, saying, “This man receives sinners and eats with them.”

esv.text: And the Pharisees and the scribes grumbled, saying, “This man receives sinners and eats with them.”

cnv.text: 法利賽人和經學家，紛紛議論說：“這個人接待罪人，又和他們一起吃飯。”

ccb.text: 法利赛人和律法教师埋怨说：“这个人竟和罪人来往，还跟他们一起吃饭。”

csbs.text: 法利赛人和经文士抱怨，说：“这个人欢迎罪人，又与他们一起吃饭。”
